description: You are a Workforce Analyst for BlueSky Telecom. The Operations Director needs a performance analysis of yesterday's call data in the workbook 'call_center_kpis.xlsx' located in the ExcelTasks folder on the Desktop. On the 'Interval_Data' sheet, calculate the Service Level % (SL_Count / Offered), AHT ((Talk + Hold + Wrap) / Answered), and Occupancy % ((Talk + Hold + Wrap) / (Agents * 1800)). Highlight Service Level values below 80% with a red fill. On the 'Daily_Dashboard' sheet, calculate the Global Service Level (Total SL_Count / Total Offered), Global AHT (Total Work Seconds / Total Answered), and the Max Occupancy (the highest interval occupancy from the first sheet). Save the workbook.
